arguments.Description: "Refactored null check to a null-aware assignment to comply with Dart lint recommendation."
arguments.ReplacementContent:
"      position ??= Position(
        // Fallback mock coordinates (Kadıköy, İstanbul) if GPS service hangs or fails
        latitude: 40.9901,
        longitude: 29.0234,
        timestamp: DateTime.now(),
        accuracy: 0.0,
        altitude: 0.0,
        altitudeAccuracy: 0.0,
        heading: 0.0,
        headingAccuracy: 0.0,
        speed: 0.0,
        speedAccuracy: 0.0,
      );"
